channel.title: Medical on A Turn for the WRS
channel.description: Recent content in Medical on A Turn for the WRS

item.title: Super-cali...what???
item.description: It is a little know fact that, as she got older, Mary Poppins acquired diabetes. Needless to say, her habit of having a spoon full of sugar to help the medicine go down is not a recommended practice for diabetics. She eventually succumbed to the disease and the coroner listed her cause of death as super-caloratic-induced-ketoacidosis. 😁
